steps.title: Use the circle form
steps.content:
A circle with center $(h,k)$ has equation
$$(x-h)^2+(y-k)^2=r^2$$
With center $(-6,1)$, substitute $h=-6$ and $k=1$ directly to get
$$(x+6)^2+(y-1)^2=r^2$$

steps.title: Match the circle equation
steps.content: The equation is $(x+6)^2+(y-1)^2=25$. The answer is D.
